nasb.text: Now may the God who gives perseverance and encouragement grant you to be of the same mind with one another according to Christ Jesus,

esv.text: May the God of endurance and encouragement grant you to live in such harmony with one another, in accord with Christ Jesus,

cnv.text: 願賜忍耐和安慰的　神，使你們彼此同心，效法基督耶穌，

ccb.text: 但愿赐忍耐和鼓励的上帝给你们合一的心去效法基督耶稣的榜样，

csbs.text: 愿赐忍耐和安慰的神，使你们藉着基督耶稣，彼此同心合意，
